company.name: Clearwater Logistics
company.tech_stack_notes: Uses a custom dispatch tool built in-house, manual scheduling spreadsheets

source: Referral from existing customer (Acme Freight, account since 2024)
message: One of your current customers, Acme Freight, recommended we talk to you. We currently do dispatch scheduling manually and it's becoming a bottleneck. Interested in a demo but no formal budget approved yet.

past_interactions.notes: Introduced via Acme Freight's account manager, warm intro email sent
Ahmed replied same day expressing interest, asked for pricing info

bant_notes: Budget not yet approved but estimated and referral-backed, Ahmed has operational authority but likely needs sign-off, clear stated need, timeline is loose
